attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 as BATCH_ID
,ACCOUNT_CLASS                 
,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT              
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
,ADJUSTMENT_ACCOUNTING_ID      
,ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
,ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NUMBER        
,ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
,ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
,AE_HEADER_ID                  
,AE_LINE_NUM                   
,AMOUNT                        
,APPLICATION_ID                
,ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
,BATCH_SOURCE                  
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,BOOKING_PERCENT               
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,COGS_DEFERRAL_FLAG            
,COGS_REV_GL_DATE              
,COGS_REV_POSTED_DATE          
,CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS         
,CONVERSION_TYPE               
,CREATED_BY                    
,CREATION_DATE                 
,CURRENCY_CODE                 
,CURRENCY_PRECISION            
,CUSTOMER_NAME                 
,CUSTOMER_NUMBER               
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID          
,DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME        
,DIST_BAL_TYPE                 
,DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             
,EDW_EXTRACTED_FLAG            
,EVENT_ID                      
,EVENT_TYPE                    
,EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,GL_DATE                       
,GL_INTERFACE_ELIGIBLE         
,GL_POSTED_DATE                
,GL_POSTED_FLAG                
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,GROUPING_ID                   
,HEADER_ID                     
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,INVOICE_TYPE                  
,JE_CATEGORY_NAME              
,JE_SOURCE_NAME                
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LEDGER_ID                     
,LINE_COGS_AMOUNT              
,LINE_ID                       
,LINE_TYPE                     
,MERAKI_FLAG                   
,OA_SKU_TYPE                   
,ORDER_NUMBER                  
,ORG_ID                        
,PERCENT_ADJ                   
,PERIOD_NAME                   
,PROCESS_ID                    
,PROFILE_ID                    
,RAO_CREATED_BY                
,RAO_CREATION_DATE             
,RAO_LAST_UPDATE_DATE          
,RAO_LAST_UPDATED_BY           
,RECOGNIZED_BOOKING_PCT        
,ROL_TRANSACTION_ID            
,SEGMENT1                      
,SEGMENT10                     
,SEGMENT2                      
,SEGMENT3                      
,SEGMENT4                      
,SEGMENT5                      
,SEGMENT6                      
,SEGMENT7                      
,SEGMENT8                      
,SEGMENT9                      
,SOURCE_BATCH_ID               
,SOURCE_BATCH_NAME             
,SOURCE_DATA_KEY5              
,SUMMARY_ID                    
,TRX_CLASS                     
,TRX_DATE                      
,TRX_NUMBER                    
,TSV_FLAG                      
,UNIQUE_ID                     
,USD_CONV_RATE                 
,WEBEX_FLAG                                 
,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME                         
,1 AS ACTION_CODE               
,COGS_ATTRIB_UPDATE_FLAG       
,CREDIT_SUMMARY_ID             
,DEBIT_SUMMARY_ID                             
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LNE_EDW_DTL
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_LNE_EDW_DTL.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
